description.value: As far removed as you might be from your First World ancestry, some spark of it still beats within you, giving you a supernaturally powerful connection to life. You Stride twice and can pass through other creatures' spaces without needing to [[/act tumble-through]]. Creatures of your choice whose space you pass through recover @Damage[@actor.level[healing]] Hit Points equal to your level. A creature with void healing treats this as a void effect. You gain temporary Hit Points equal to your level at the end of your movement. These last for 1 minute.
